executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 6 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 6 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs
